name: Pasta with Asparagas Gremolata
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the orange zest, garlic, and parsley in a food processor fitted with the metal blade. Pulse the machine several times, stopping to scrape down the bowl, then process until finely chopped.
2. Bring the reduced broth to a boil in a saucepan. To make reduced broth, briskly boil 2 cups of broth until it evaporates to one cup. Set aside, covered.
3. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over moderate-to-high heat. Saute the asparagas until tender-crisp, about 3 minutes.
4. Spoon the asparagas over freshly cooked pasta. Sprinkle with the gremolata, then moisten with the hot broth.
